button.more.description: Text for the more actions button

button.replace_section.description: Text for the button to replace a section in the song

button.generate_lyrics.description: Text for the button to automatically generate lyrics using AI

button.all_stems.description: Text for the button to separate all tracks

button.swap_vocals.description: Text for the vocal swap button

button.swap_instrumentals.description: Text for the instrumental swap button

button.clear_all.description: Text for the button to clear all configurations

mode.simple.description: Label for the simple generation mode tab

mode.custom.description: Label for the custom generation mode tab

name.style.description: Prompt for song style content input

name.title.description: Prompt for song title content input

name.weirdness.description: Controls the level of creativity in generated music

name.soundStrength.description: Controls the intensity of the generated sound

name.lyricsStrength.description: Controls how much the lyrics affect the generated result

name.replaceSection.description: Replace a segment in the song

description.prompt.message: Describe the music style and theme you want

description.style.message: Describe the music style, e.g., acoustic pop, jazz, electronic

description.styleNegative.message: Describe unwanted styles, e.g., heavy metal, screaming
description.styleNegative.description: Description of the excluded style parameter

description.uploadAudios.message: Upload music as reference. Wait during upload, then generation will use the uploaded music.

description.weirdness.message: Higher values produce more creative and experimental music (0-100)

description.soundStrength.message: Controls the intensity of the sound (0-100)

description.lyricsStrength.message: Controls how much lyrics influence the result (0-100)

description.seed.message: Enter a seed for reproducible results, leave empty for random

description.lyricPrompt.message: Enter a lyric description, AI will generate lyrics automatically

description.replaceSection.message: Replace content within a specific time range in the song

description.instrumental.message: Generate instrumental music only, lyrics will be ignored

placeholder.prompt.message: Describe the music you want, e.g., a warm folk song about autumn memories...

placeholder.lyrics.message:
[Verse]
In this quiet night
Stars sparkle in the sky

[Chorus]
Let's sing together
Until dawn...

placeholder.style.message: e.g., acoustic pop, jazz, R&B, electronic...

placeholder.lyricPrompt.message: Describe the lyric theme, AI will generate automatically...

placeholder.replaceSectionStart.description: Placeholder for replace section start time

placeholder.replaceSectionEnd.description: Placeholder for replace section end time

message.startingTask.description: Message shown when a music generation task begins

message.startingUploadAudio.description: Message shown when a music generation task starts

message.uploadReferencesExceed.message: Uploaded music exceeds the maximum limit
message.uploadReferencesExceed.description: Error message when uploaded music exceeds the allowed number

message.uploadReferencesError.description: Error message when music upload fails

message.startTaskSuccess.description: Success message when a music generation task starts successfully

message.startUploadAudioSuccess.description: Success message when custom music is uploaded successfully

message.startUploadAudioFailed.description: Error message when starting a music generation task fails due to upload issues

message.startTaskFailed.message: Failed to start music generation task
message.startTaskFailed.description: Error message when starting a music generation task fails

message.getVideoUrlFailed.message: Failed to get music video, please try again later
message.getVideoUrlFailed.description: Error message when fetching the video fails

message.generatingLyrics.description: Message shown while lyrics are being generated

message.generateLyricsSuccess.description: Message shown when lyrics generation succeeds

message.generateLyricsFailed.description: Message shown when lyrics generation fails

message.fetchingWav.description: Message shown while fetching a WAV file

message.fetchWavFailed.description: Message shown when fetching a WAV file fails

message.generating.description: Message shown while music is being generated

message.generateFailed.description: Message shown when music generation fails

message.noOperations.description: Message shown when there are no available operations

message.noTasks.message: No history tasks, generate music from the left panel
message.noTasks.description: Message shown when there are no previous tasks
